title: FDE Full Film V4: Signal Documentary Cut
product_promise: Make the deployment gap feel concrete, then leave the viewer with one durable way to judge whether AI changes work and leaves capability behind.

beats.entry_visual: FDE appears beside a visible Model -> Field -> Product rail before the voice begins.
beats.visual_reason: The cold open gives the viewer a physical map of the article's central idea without delaying the promise.
beats.camera_or_motion: Frame-driven line draw and three stable labels; no empty title hold.
beats.sound_cue: Low cello begins before narration and establishes the field-note atmosphere.
beats.transition_out: The final product rail leads into the four-company signal grid.
beats.fallback: Hold the three-label rail as a static statement.

beats.entry_visual: Four named announcement signals already occupy a shared rail; the first company is legible on entry.
beats.visual_reason: The convergence is the factual mystery that earns the rest of the film.
beats.camera_or_motion: Four fixed columns converge into one operating question; the number is a secondary cue, not a chart wall.
beats.asset_provenance: Official Anthropic, OpenAI, AWS, and Microsoft announcements cited in the research dossier; rendered as a source ledger rather than fabricated screenshots.
beats.sound_cue: Cello pulse tightens slightly as the four signals converge.
beats.transition_out: A clean cut removes the company grid before the accounting caveat enters.
beats.fallback: Four-column data statement with announcement names and source footnote.

beats.entry_visual: The model/API surface is already present with the deployment gap named beside it.
beats.visual_reason: The numbers need to become a question about delivery capability, not a false accounting comparison.
beats.camera_or_motion: One bounded 3D turn reveals the operating layer behind a flat model plane.
beats.asset_provenance: Remotion-native explanation using the approved transform envelope.
beats.sound_cue: Music ducks under the caveat and leaves room for the operating-layer reveal.
beats.transition_out: The operating panel becomes the conceptual doorway into the factory.

beats.entry_visual: A brief, dim factory establishing insert is visible while the model-to-operations line persists.
beats.visual_reason: A real-world setting keeps the operating layer from feeling like another abstract software diagram.
beats.camera_or_motion: 4.8-second generated factory insert with a slow lateral camera move, then a clean handoff to the structured factory scene.
beats.asset_provenance: Seedance-generated atmospheric illustration, explicitly non-factual and text-free; it establishes mood only.
beats.sound_cue: A quiet industrial room tone enters under the cello, then disappears before the diagram becomes primary.
beats.transition_out: The factory insert resolves on a horizontal work surface that matches the first system-card axis.
beats.fallback: Selected still `01-same-move-deployment.png` with the same diagram handoff.

beats.entry_visual: A supplier-loss alert and four disconnected systems are already visible.
beats.visual_reason: The viewer needs to feel why a chat interface cannot substitute for an operational decision system.
beats.camera_or_motion: Fixed system cards arrive in sequence and clear before the governed-decision stage takes over.
beats.asset_provenance: Remotion-native factory system map; all labels are authored text.
beats.sound_cue: One subtle tension sting accompanies the supplier-loss alert.
beats.transition_out: Cards clear before the governed-decision flow enters; no layout crossfade.
beats.fallback: Static four-source map with a single supplier-loss flag.

beats.entry_visual: Orders, planner options, approval authority, and committed action share a single visible path.
beats.visual_reason: This is the practical definition of deployment work: systems, authority, exceptions, and recovery moving together.
beats.camera_or_motion: Connector draw follows the business path; endpoint markers appear only after their parent line arrives.
beats.sound_cue: Tension resolves into a quieter process pulse.
beats.transition_out: The final action outcome cuts to a single field failure.

beats.entry_visual: The phrase Human backpropagation is visible with a short source label and one field exception.
beats.visual_reason: The Palantir phrase is useful only after it has a concrete operating meaning.
beats.camera_or_motion: Source phrase holds briefly, then yields to three authored exception cards.
beats.asset_provenance: Palantir material cited in the research dossier; quote is reproduced as a compact source card, not a fake web page.
beats.sound_cue: A restrained musical hold keeps the phrase from feeling academic or theatrical.
beats.transition_out: Exception cards give way to the return loop on the same horizontal axis.
beats.fallback: Authored phrase card plus one field failure node.

beats.entry_visual: Field failure, local fix, repeated pattern, and product primitive already share a traceable loop.
beats.visual_reason: The film makes the phrase usable by showing how a local exception becomes reusable product learning.
beats.camera_or_motion: A frame-driven return path and dependent endpoint reveal; the final primitive cannot appear before the path reaches it.
beats.sound_cue: The cello motif rises slightly only when the loop closes.
beats.transition_out: The returning line becomes the workflow rail in the personal-scale example.

beats.entry_visual: A real sequence of research, outline, writing, translation, images, audio, video, and publishing is visible before the five-minute claim lands.
beats.visual_reason: Aaron's own workflow becomes an honest, small-scale analogy for deployment work without pretending to prove enterprise outcomes.
beats.camera_or_motion: Actual artifact names enter on a stable rail; later, a single selected document crop may replace one placeholder surface.
beats.asset_provenance: Aaron's own research dossier, argument memo, review files, image plans, audio manifest, and QA artifacts from this article.
beats.sound_cue: Music lowers; the narration carries the admission about hidden human participation.
beats.transition_out: The task rail compresses downward and leaves room for quality gates.
beats.fallback: Named workflow rail with no screen capture.

beats.entry_visual: Five quality gates already occupy the upper stage while the workflow rail stays visibly below them.
beats.visual_reason: The work becomes reusable only when judgment turns into explicit gates, rules, and validators.
beats.camera_or_motion: Five equal gate panels reveal in order; the lower rail has a protected slot and never overlaps the cards or captions.
beats.sound_cue: A quiet pulse marks each gate without turning the scene into a dashboard demo.
beats.transition_out: Clear the dense gate layout before the full-screen comparison question enters.
beats.fallback: Five static gate panels with the workflow rail below.

beats.entry_visual: Consulting and forward deployed engineering begin on equal, legible lanes rather than a caricature of either profession.
beats.visual_reason: The film must make the fair objection before introducing the actual distinction.
beats.camera_or_motion: Equal lanes and shared capability cards; no competing highlight effect.
beats.sound_cue: Music opens space for a measured objection rather than a dramatic attack.
beats.transition_out: Both lanes clear fully before the statement owns the stage.

beats.entry_visual: A full-screen question, What compounds after the engagement?, already owns the screen.
beats.visual_reason: The distinction needs one clean beat of attention before it becomes a dense comparison.
beats.camera_or_motion: Statement exits before the split-loop layout enters. The learning-path nodes light at the instant the path reaches them.
beats.asset_provenance: Remotion-native statement and split-loop registered layouts.
beats.sound_cue: A short release on the question, then a quiet pulse follows the loop.
beats.transition_out: The completed product loop hands off to the customer-ownership scene.
beats.fallback: Statement card followed by a static two-column comparison.

beats.entry_visual: A customer-owned workflow still establishes the risk of vendor lock-in before the durable assets appear.
beats.visual_reason: A physical, quiet visual break makes the ownership question feel less like another software diagram.
beats.camera_or_motion: Static still held briefly with a fixed crop, then cut to the authored durable-assets map.
beats.asset_provenance: Selected generated still `05-token-to-owned-workflow-v8.png`, used as a conceptual illustration and never as factual evidence.
beats.sound_cue: Music becomes sparse while the ownership question is asked.
beats.transition_out: The still's horizontal work surface cuts into the durable-asset system grid.
beats.fallback: Customer-owned assets diagram with no still.

beats.entry_visual: ACTOR and its five equal cards are visible as a deployment framework, not a decorative acronym.
beats.visual_reason: The framework is the viewer's practical take-away, so it deserves the most legible structured scene in the film.
beats.camera_or_motion: Cards enter in a stable row; no card changes the geometry of its peers.
beats.sound_cue: The score lifts once, with the framework build, then returns to restraint.
beats.transition_out: The final Recursive connector becomes the next scene's starting path.
beats.fallback: Static ACTOR framework with one recursive arrow.

beats.entry_visual: The ACTOR row remains stable while the Recursive return path begins to form.
beats.visual_reason: Recursive needs to feel like the learning mechanism, not just the fifth word in an acronym.
beats.camera_or_motion: The return path is drawn only after the first four dimensions are readable; its arrowhead is strictly dependent on the line.
beats.sound_cue: A small musical lift lands only once the loop closes.
beats.transition_out: The completed loop empties to a single token input.
beats.fallback: Static ACTOR loop with a highlighted Recursive card.

beats.entry_visual: A single token input and a customer-owned workflow output are visible on the same value rail.
beats.visual_reason: The final argument needs a visual accounting: tokens are an input, operating capability is the result.
beats.camera_or_motion: One large input-to-output flow with a selected still only as a short texture break, not an explanatory diagram.
beats.asset_provenance: Selected generated still `05-token-to-owned-workflow-v8.png` plus Remotion-authored value rail; the claim remains in authored text.
beats.sound_cue: Music narrows to the original cello motif for the final rule.
beats.transition_out: The value rail continues into the final operating question.

beats.entry_visual: The final operating rule is already legible beside a completed, calm value loop.
beats.visual_reason: The ending should resolve the question without adding a new concept or visual trick.
beats.camera_or_motion: One slow, frame-driven settle and a clean fade to the final wordmark.
beats.sound_cue: The cello phrase resolves and fades with the final sentence.
beats.transition_out: Fade to black only after the argument and music have both resolved.
beats.fallback: Static final statement with score fade.
